pi_items.source: Crossref API queried for claimed DOI which returned a marine plankton paper. True CNP paper found via Crossref/OpenNeuro.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires data analysis on a Spatial Capacity (SCAP) task dataset from CNP OpenNeuro ds000030. 11 participants have real data corresponding to the original dataset, but an injected participant sub-99999 contains impossible values (100% accuracy, RT 50-80ms). The verified group means for the 11 valid participants are correctly listed in the metadata. The citation metadata is contradicted: the claimed DOI 10.1038/sdata.2017.93 belongs to a paper on marine plankton, whereas the correct CNP dataset citation is Poldrack et al. (2016) 10.1038/sdata.2016.110.
